Informe sobre desarrollo y esperanza de vida

Carga y exploración de los datos

# En caso de no tenerlo instalado
# install.packages("tidyverse")
# install.packages("gapminder")
# install.packages("easystats")

# Cargar paquetes
library(tidyverse)
library(gapminder)
library(easystats)

# visualizar los datos
glimpse(gapminder)
Rows: 1,704
Columns: 6
$ country   <fct> "Afghanistan", "Afghanistan", "Afghanistan", "Afghanistan", …
$ continent <fct> Asia, Asia, Asia, Asia, Asia, Asia, Asia, Asia, Asia, Asia, …
$ year      <int> 1952, 1957, 1962, 1967, 1972, 1977, 1982, 1987, 1992, 1997, …
$ lifeExp   <dbl> 28.801, 30.332, 31.997, 34.020, 36.088, 38.438, 39.854, 40.8…
$ pop       <int> 8425333, 9240934, 10267083, 11537966, 13079460, 14880372, 12…
$ gdpPercap <dbl> 779.4453, 820.8530, 853.1007, 836.1971, 739.9811, 786.1134, …
head(gapminder)
# A tibble: 6 × 6
  country     continent  year lifeExp      pop gdpPercap
  <fct>       <fct>     <int>   <dbl>    <int>     <dbl>
1 Afghanistan Asia       1952    28.8  8425333      779.
2 Afghanistan Asia       1957    30.3  9240934      821.
3 Afghanistan Asia       1962    32.0 10267083      853.
4 Afghanistan Asia       1967    34.0 11537966      836.
5 Afghanistan Asia       1972    36.1 13079460      740.
6 Afghanistan Asia       1977    38.4 14880372      786.

Esperanza de vida media por continente

vida_continent <- gapminder |>
  group_by(continent) |>
  summarise(
    vida_media = mean(lifeExp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

vida_continent |>
  knitr::kable()
continent vida_media
Africa 48.86533
Americas 64.65874
Asia 60.06490
Europe 71.90369
Oceania 74.32621

Los 10 países más longevos

top_10_longevos <- gapminder |>
  group_by(country) |>
  summarise(
    vida_media = mean(lifeExp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") |> 
  arrange(desc(vida_media)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10)

top_10_longevos |>
  knitr::kable()
country vida_media
Iceland 76.51142
Sweden 76.17700
Norway 75.84300
Netherlands 75.64850
Switzerland 75.56508
Canada 74.90275
Japan 74.82692
Australia 74.66292
Denmark 74.37017
France 74.34892

Los 10 países menos longevos

bottom_10_longevos <- gapminder |>
  group_by(country) |>
  summarise(
    vida_media = mean(lifeExp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") |> 
  arrange(vida_media) |>
  slice_head(n = 10)

bottom_10_longevos |>
  knitr::kable()
country vida_media
Sierra Leone 36.76917
Afghanistan 37.47883
Angola 37.88350
Guinea-Bissau 39.21025
Mozambique 40.37950
Somalia 40.98867
Rwanda 41.48158
Liberia 42.47625
Equatorial Guinea 42.96000
Guinea 43.23983

Esperanza de vida media por continente

vida_continente <- gapminder |>
  group_by(continent) |>
  summarise(
    vida_media = mean(lifeExp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

vida_continente |>
  knitr::kable()
continent vida_media
Africa 48.86533
Americas 64.65874
Asia 60.06490
Europe 71.90369
Oceania 74.32621

Relación entre PIB per cápita y esperanza de vida

Effect sizes were labelled following Funder’s (2019) recommendations.

The Pearson’s product-moment correlation between gapminder\(lifeExp and gapminder\)gdpPercap is positive, statistically significant, and very large (r = 0.58, 95% CI [0.55, 0.61], t(1702) = 29.66, p < .001)

gapminder |>
  ggplot(aes(x = gdpPercap, y = lifeExp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Relación entre PIB per cápita y esperanza de vida",
    x = "PIB per cápita (escala logarítmica)",
    y = "Esperanza de vida"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

Resumen general

vida_global <- round(mean(gapminder$lifeExp, na.rm = TRUE), 1)

La esperanza de vida media global en esta base de datos es de 59.5 años.
